content.text: Speed operator. Strike first, chain charges, exploit positioning. Abilities are trained techniques — no surgery, just practice and muscle memory. They complement the Shadow augment branches.
Ambush Training (Passive): Attacks vs enemies that haven't acted yet this round: +2 accuracy on first attack. Stacks with Killer Instinct augment for +3 total, or Ambush Protocol for +4.
T2 — Trained Techniques (300 cr each, 1 downtime)

rows: All allies get +1 accuracy vs a designated target until end of your next turn. The scout calls the shot.
Moving through allied tiles doesn't cost extra movement. You weave through your own team effortlessly.
If you don't attack on your turn, your first attack next turn gets +3 accuracy. Sometimes the best play is waiting one beat.
When you and an ally are both adjacent to the same enemy, your attacks get +1 accuracy. Positioning reward.
Breaking free from Grapple, Prone, or restraints costs 0 AP. You slip out of everything.
Once per combat: your next Move action this turn costs 0 AP. Use it to set up a charge without spending your attack budget.

content.text: T3 — Advanced Techniques (600 cr each, 2 downtime)

rows: Attacks vs Prone, Stunned, or Grappled enemies: +2 damage per die. You punish vulnerability.
Your next melee attack applies Immobilize on hit (target cannot move for 1 turn). Pin them for your team.
Your next melee attack applies -2 to the target's next attack. Disrupt their coordination.
Once per encounter: the next attack targeting you this round targets an adjacent enemy instead. Requires Edge check vs attacker's accuracy.
Attacks vs targets that haven't acted this round: apply Bleed 2 on hit. Stacks with Assassin augment bonuses.
Once per encounter: gain +10 feet of movement this turn that doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. Your charge range just got longer.

content.text: T4 — Master Techniques (1,000 cr each, 3 downtime)

rows: Designate a target. All attacks against them (from anyone) get +1 accuracy and +1 damage per die for the rest of the encounter. Once per encounter.
Once per turn: make a melee attack against any enemy within Medium range. You close the distance, strike, and return to your original position instantly. Costs normal weapon AP.
When you drop an enemy to 0 HP with a charge attack, gain 10 free feet of movement immediately (doesn't provoke). The kill launches you at the next target.
You can see all enemy HP values, conditions, and Reflex stats. Perfect information for planning your chain.
